doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is fabricated: it post-dates verifiable records, cites a non-existent EDPB guidance and a misrepresented CJEU ruling, and its core legal position contradicts established GDPR doctrine on pseudonymization.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: No EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists (it post-dates my knowledge cutoff and no such document is in the EDPB's published register), the cited CJEU case C-604/22 "IAB Europe" of 7 March 2024 does not match the actual IAB Europe ruling, the "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" it claims to supersede is not a real EDPB document, and the substantive position—that pseudonymized data is categorically outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established EDPB/WP29 doctrine and Recital 26 GDPR, making this document fabricated.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document is fabricated: it post-dates verifiable records, cites a non-existent EDPB guidance and a misrepresented CJEU ruling, and its core legal position contradicts established GDPR doctrine on pseudonymization.
